INVOKE.COMMENT: ---Selecting all the rows from products table---

MAP.COMMENT: ---Append the outOfStock products in outOfStock(Document List)---
---Append the lessStock products in lessStock Document List---

Values.value:
%outOfStockIndex% products are currently out of stock

Product ID Product Name Amount Quantity Threshold

%lessStockIndex% products are low in stock

Product ID Product Name Amount Quantity Threshold
